Name: Calculating
Description: Reads the room before stepping in. Slower under pressure, sharper at planning.

Name: Volatile
Description: Quick to escalate. Useful in a fight, hard to keep on a leash.

Name: Dutiful
Description: Treats the contract as a covenant.

Name: Cynical
Description: Trusts nothing. Reads everyone's angle, including yours.

Name: Compassionate
Description: Sees civilians as people. The job grinds harder against this one.

Name: Ex-Military
Description: Carried a rifle for someone's flag.

Name: Ex-Corporate
Description: Knows how the boardroom thinks because they used to sit in one.

Name: Ex-Press
Description: Used to chase the story. Now they bury it.

Name: Ex-Street
Description: Came up running fences and forging tags.

Name: Ex-Intel
Description: An old badge in a desk drawer somewhere.

Name: Heavy Drinker
Description: Not enough to fail a screening. Enough that you notice.

Name: Stim Habit
Description: Black-market neural enhancers. Edge today, debt tomorrow.

Name: Gambler
Description: Owes money to people who don't write it down.

Name: Adrenaline Junkie
Description: Picks the riskier door on purpose.

Name: Perfectionist
Description: Re-checks every wire. Burns time, saves lives.

Name: Keeps Records
Description: Writes everything down. Useful. Dangerous.

Name: Pathological Loyalty
Description: Will not abandon a teammate, even when they should.

Name: Stoic
Description: Doesn't flinch. Doesn't celebrate. Just works.

Name: Paranoid
Description: Trusts no schedule, no badge, no door. Catches what others miss — and what isn't there.

Name: Magnetic
Description: People listen even when they shouldn't. Especially when they shouldn't.

Name: Precise
Description: Doesn't waste a motion. Doesn't waste a syllable.

Name: Ex-Clergy
Description: Took vows in a chapel that doesn't exist anymore.

Name: Ex-Medic
Description: Pulled triggers in a uniform. Pulled bullets out afterwards.

Name: Ex-Assassin
Description: Worked for someone who paid in numbered accounts. Won't talk about it.

Name: Ex-Academy
Description: Made it three years into a corp officer program before something gave.

Name: Data Hoarder
Description: Hoards leaked dumps the way junkies hoard. The next leak is always the one.

Name: Arena Junkie
Description: Off-book combat sims. Pays in adrenaline, costs in dreams.

Name: Synth-Empath
Description: Synth-empathy mods bought from a clinic that doesn't exist on the map.

Name: Pre-Mission Rituals
Description: Three things in the same order before every job. Don't ask which three.

Name: Compulsive Confessor
Description: Has to tell someone. Picks the wrong someone often enough to be a problem.

Name: Hard Codes
Description: Won't cross certain lines. The lines weren't in their contract.
